notes: RVAs (relative virtual addresses) from the module base. Resolve at runtime as `process.base_address + rva`. Valid as long as the engine binary is not recompiled.

player_health.description: Local player HP. Matches the HUD value in real time.
player_health.found_via: Cheat Engine: scan 4 Bytes exact value, narrowed by taking damage, confirmed by watching value track the HUD.
